Anthony Head, Esq. (415) 425-4825 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Creditors Trade Association, Inc.
William F. Ghiringhelli, Esq. (510) 739-6495 for Defendant and Opposing Party Hifai
RULING:
Counsel report case has settled and request a continuance of Plaintiff's motion; GRANTED. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is CONTINUED to 01/07/05 in Dept. 301. Counsel are directed to notify the Court if the motion may go off calendar. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina T. Paxton, CSR #1558
